tagline: Navigate by calm, not just speed.

designSystem.style: Calm, nature-inspired minimalism with teal/mint accent palette, soft surface layering, and purposeful whitespace evoking clarity and ease

screens: Navigate — Live map with calm route overlay, dynamic island navigation status, calm score ring, noise alert banner, and bottom route card with start/stop navigation
Routes — Route comparison cards with CalmScore rings, highlights, tags, turn-by-turn directions, and personalized profile banner
Community — Live community reports with filter tabs, confirm/navigate-around actions, report submission button, and weekly area stats
Profile — Sensitivity level selector, route preference toggles, appearance/theme switcher, and personal journey stats dashboard
